## Validation

- [ ] `npm run format`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run coverage`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run check`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated tests or confirmed existing tests cover this change.
- [ ] I updated documentation where behavior, setup, or workflows changed.
- [ ] I checked that the app still works locally for the changed flow.
